2603.25981.title: Policy-Guided World Model Planning for Language-Conditioned Visual Navigation
2603.25981.paper_summary: Navigating to a visually specified goal given natural language instructions remains a fundamental challenge in embodied AI. Existing approaches either rely on reactive policies that struggle with long-horizon planning, or employ world models that suffer from poor action initialization in high-dimensional spaces. We present PiJEPA, a two-stage framework that combines the strengths of learned navigation policies with latent world model planning for instruction-conditioned visual navigation. In the first stage, we finetune an Octo-based generalist policy, augmented with a frozen pretrained vision encoder (DINOv2 or V-JEPA-2), on the CAST navigation dataset to produce an informed action distribution conditioned on the current observation and language instruction. In the second stage, we use this policy-derived distribution to warm-start Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) planning over a separately trained JEPA world model, which predicts future latent states in the embedding space of the same frozen encoder. By initializing the MPPI sampling distribution from the policy prior rather than from an uninformed Gaussian, our planner converges faster to high-quality action sequences that reach the goal. We systematically study the effect of the vision encoder backbone, comparing DINOv2 and V-JEPA-2, across both the policy and world model components. Experiments on real-world navigation tasks demonstrate that PiJEPA significantly outperforms both standalone policy execution and uninformed world model planning, achieving improved goal-reaching accuracy and instruction-following fidelity.
2603.25981.paper_summary_zh: 在自然語言指令下導航至視覺指定的目標仍然是具身人工智慧中的一個基本挑戰。現有的方法要麼依賴於在長期規劃中掙扎的反應性策略，要麼使用在高維空間中初始化行動效果不佳的世界模型。我們提出了PiJEPA，一個兩階段框架，結合了學習導航策略的優勢與潛在世界模型規劃，用於指令條件的視覺導航。在第一階段，我們在CAST導航數據集上微調了一個基於Octo的通用策略，並增強了一個凍結的預訓練視覺編碼器（DINOv2或V-JEPA-2），以生成基於當前觀察和語言指令的知情行動分佈。在第二階段，我們使用這個策略衍生的分佈來熱啟動基於單獨訓練的JEPA世界模型的模型預測路徑積分（MPPI）規劃，該模型預測在同一凍結編碼器的嵌入空間中的未來潛在狀態。通過從策略先驗而非從未知的高斯分佈初始化MPPI取樣分佈，我們的規劃器更快地收斂到高質量的行動序列，以達到目標。我們系統性地研究了視覺編碼器骨幹的影響，對DINOv2和V-JEPA-2在策略和世界模型組件中的表現進行比較。在現實世界的導航任務中的實驗顯示，PiJEPA顯著超越了獨立的策略執行和未知的世界模型規劃，實現了更高的達標準確性和指令遵循的忠實度。
2603.25981.author: Amirhosein Chahe et.al.
